assessment_items.question_content:
**Ravenna was an important Roman port city and served as the capital city for the western half of the empire.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: **This is correct. Ravenna, an important Roman port city, played a key role at the end of the Roman Empire and served as the capital city for the western half of the empire.**

assessment_items.question_content: **Galla Placidia, daughter of Emperor Theodosius, ruled the Western Empire as [[☃ dropdown 1]].**
hints: **Galla Placidia was the daughter of Emperor Theodosius, who married her to Ataulf, King of the Visigoths. Later, she ruled the Western Empire as Regent.**

assessment_items.question_content:
**The Mausoleum of Galla Placidia was originally attached to a [[☃ dropdown 1]], that Gala Placidia also built.**


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/db3d918c032192a177f0f3b25f42b66c.png)
hints: **The Mausoleum of Galla Placidia was originally attached to a church that Galla Placidia also built. **

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following is NOT true of the Mausoleum of Galla Placidia?**


![Outside view of the Mausoleum of Galla Placidia, made of reused ancient Roman brick. ](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/db3d918c032192a177f0f3b25f42b66c.png)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: **The Mausoleum of Galla Placidia does not house her sarcophagus. She is thought to have died in Rome. There are three tombs in the mausoleum, but none of them belong to her.**

choices.content:
The interior walls are covered with marble revetment and the vaults and ceiling areas are covered in the original fifth century mosaics.
![The interior wall covered with marble revetment, and the vaults and ceiling areas covered in the original fifth century mosaics](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ef406ca7767c44f41bdd3946682dea9c.png)

Many of the mosaics show decorative forms that are similar to Ancient Roman decorative floral and acanthus leaf forms.
![Mosaic showing decorative forms that are similar to Ancient Roman decorative floral and acanthus leaf forms](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/5f04a9ec47f3b1ceb3f16e5ba357ff3f.png)

In the mosaic scenes, the figures and objects do not relate to each other in a way that makes spatial sense.
![Mosaic scene showing the figures and objects do not relate to each other in a way that makes spatial sense.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6ed700c2d8d7854260cc9d7b7c8170e2.png)

The mausoleum houses Galla Placidia's sarcophagus. 
![The mausoleum housing Galla Placidia's sarcophagus. ](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ba6646c7345b4ecbbffa515b61a09e85.png)
